---
title: "Stage 01.2 — Ambient RNA Removal (DecontX)"
subtitle: "iSN snRNA-seq Pipeline"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
    theme: flatly
    self_contained: true
    dev: ragg_png
knit: (function(input, ...) rmarkdown::render(input, output_dir = "DecontX_out", ...))
params:
  project_root: "/scratch/rmlab/rmlab_shared3/tyron/Rscriptv2/iSN/iSN_claude"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.align = "center", dev = "ragg_png")
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = params$project_root)
options(knitr.graphics.rel_path = FALSE)
```

```{r libraries}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
library(knitr)
library(viridis)
```

```{r load}
out_dir <- file.path(params$project_root, "scripts/01.2_DecontX/DecontX_out")
seu <- readRDS(file.path(out_dir, "iSN_decontX.rds"))
```

## Cell counts per sample

```{r cell-counts}
knitr::kable(as.data.frame(table(seu$sample_group)), col.names = c("Sample", "Cells"),
             caption = "Post-DecontX cell counts per sample")
```

## Contamination score summary

```{r contamination-summary}
meta <- seu@meta.data
contam_tbl <- meta %>%
  dplyr::group_by(sample_group) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_cells      = dplyr::n(),
    pct_gt_0.5   = round(mean(decontX_contamination > 0.5) * 100, 1),
    pct_gt_0.8   = round(mean(decontX_contamination > 0.8) * 100, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
knitr::kable(contam_tbl,
             col.names = c("Sample", "Cells", "% contamination > 0.5", "% contamination > 0.8"),
             caption = "Contamination score summary per sample")
```

```{r contamination-hist, fig.width=8, fig.height=4}
ggplot(meta, aes(x = decontX_contamination)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 100, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0.5, color = "orange", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0.8, color = "red",    linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Distribution of DecontX contamination scores",
       x = "Contamination score", y = "Count")
```

## UMAP — contamination score

```{r umap-contamination, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
df <- seu@meta.data[, c("UMAP1", "UMAP2", "decontX_contamination", "sample_group", "decontX_clusters")]
ggplot(df, aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2, color = decontX_contamination)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.1, alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "plasma") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "DecontX contamination score", color = "Contamination")
```

## UMAP — decontX clusters

```{r umap-clusters, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
ggplot(df, aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2, color = factor(decontX_clusters))) +
  geom_point(size = 0.1, alpha = 0.7) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "DecontX clusters", color = "Cluster")
```

## UMAP — sample

```{r umap-sample, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
ggplot(df, aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2, color = sample_group)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.1, alpha = 0.7) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Sample identity", color = "Sample")
```

## nCount before vs after decontX

```{r ncount-comparison, fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
available_cols <- colnames(seu@meta.data)
if ("nCount_originalexp" %in% available_cols) {
  VlnPlot(seu, features = c("nCount_RNA", "nCount_originalexp"),
          group.by = "decontX_clusters", pt.size = 0, ncol = 2)
} else {
  message("nCount_originalexp not found in metadata — skipping comparison violin plot.")
}
```

## Saved DecontX figures

_Figures below are reproduced from saved outputs of `01.2_DecontX.R` using celda visualisation functions. These require the full SCE object and cannot be regenerated from the saved .rds alone._

### Contamination UMAP (celda)

```{r fig-01, fig.width=10}
knitr::include_graphics(file.path(out_dir, "01_contamination_UMAP.png"))
```

### nCount violin (celda)

```{r fig-02, fig.width=10}
knitr::include_graphics(file.path(out_dir, "02_nCount_violin.png"))
```

### Marker expression — raw counts

```{r fig-03, fig.width=10}
knitr::include_graphics(file.path(out_dir, "03_markers_raw.png"))
```

### Marker expression — decontX counts

```{r fig-04, fig.width=10}
knitr::include_graphics(file.path(out_dir, "04_markers_decontX.png"))
```

### Marker percentage bar chart

```{r fig-05, fig.width=10}
knitr::include_graphics(file.path(out_dir, "05_marker_percentage.png"))
```

### Marker expression violins (counts)

```{r fig-06, fig.width=10}
knitr::include_graphics(file.path(out_dir, "06_marker_expression_counts.png"))
```

## Session info

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
